title: Rearrange Words in a Sentence
titleCn: 重新排列句子中的单词

testcases.input: text = "Leetcode is cool" Output: "Is cool leetcode" Explanation: There are 3 words, "Leetcode" of length 8, "is" of length 2 and "cool" of length 4. Output is ordered by length and the new first word starts with capital letter.
testcases.expectedOutput: "Is cool leetcode" Explanation: There are 3 words, "Leetcode" of length 8, "is" of length 2 and "cool" of length 4. Output is ordered by length and the new first word starts with capital letter.

testcases.input: text = "Keep calm and code on" Output: "On and keep calm code" Explanation: Output is ordered as follows: "On" 2 letters. "and" 3 letters. "keep" 4 letters in case of tie order by position in original text. "calm" 4 letters. "code" 4 letters.
testcases.expectedOutput: "On and keep calm code" Explanation: Output is ordered as follows: "On" 2 letters. "and" 3 letters. "keep" 4 letters in case of tie order by position in original text. "calm" 4 letters. "code" 4 letters.

testcases.input: text = "To be or not to be" Output: "To be or to be not"
